response: The voice actress in the animated film Alpha and Omega, Catherine Davis "Kate" Higgins, voiced Sakura Haruno in "Naruto," C.C. in "Code Geass," Saber in "Fate/stay Night," and Miles "Tails" Prower in the "Sonic the Hedgehog" video game series. She also voiced Kate, Stinky, and Lilly in the "Alpha and Omega" sequels and Ami Mizuno / Sailor Mercury in the Viz English dub of "Sailor Moon."
